home.introSub: A home that adorns your garden and protects your dog.
home.introBody: EMERGO combines artisan craftsmanship with timeless design. Every home is custom-made — for your dog, your garden, your taste.
home.craftBody: We select only the finest FSC-certified timber. Every joint is hand-fitted, every surface carefully finished. The result is a home that remains beautiful for decades.
home.mat01Text: Responsibly harvested, always traceable. We work exclusively with certified suppliers.
home.mat02Text: Every size, every colour, every detail. Tailored to your dog, your garden, and your personal wishes.
home.mat03Text: On construction and finish. Always. We stand behind every home we make.
home.customBody: From dimensions to finish colour — everything is decided together with you. Not a catalogue piece, but a home that fits your situation exactly.
home.quoteText: Our EMERGO home is absolutely beautiful. Rex loves it and it fits perfectly with our garden.

products.heroBody: The EMERGO Kennel and Shelter are each designed from the same conviction — an outdoor home must be beautiful, durable, and last a lifetime.
products.configBody: Enter your desired width and depth. We'll immediately show the matching models from our collection.
products.ctaHeading: Do you know what you're looking for?
products.ctaSub: Or still unsure? We're happy to help.

kennel.cardTagline: The classic outdoor home — architectural, insulated, timeless.

shelter.cardTagline: An architectural outdoor home that blends into the garden.

footer.tagline: Premium outdoor homes for dogs. Made with craftsmanship.

productDetail.responseTime: We respond within 1 business day · No obligation
